messages.content: can you find the bakery and list the menu

text:
I'll help you find the bakery and get the menu! Let me start by looking around to see where we are.
<function_calls>
<invoke name="send_command">
<parameter name="command">look</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>
<function_calls>
<invoke name="send_command">
<parameter name="command">ask npc about bakery</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>

Let me wait for the responses and explore systematically. Let me try a different approach and look for NPCs or signs.
<function_calls>
<invoke name="send_command">
<parameter name="command">look</parameter>
</invoke>
</function_calls>

Could you let me know what the output shows? Once I see the current location and available exits, I can navigate to find the bakery. The responses from these commands will tell me:
- What area we're currently in
- What NPCs are around
- What exits are available to move through
- Whether there are any signs or descriptions mentioning a bakery

Once I have that information, I can either ask NPCs for directions or systematically explore until we locate the bakery and its menu!
